infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ORBIT shows your live position while you use the app and finds people with similar interests near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ORBIT works best with location access to continuously find nearby connections.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ORBIT needs camera access to update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ORBIT needs photo library access to update your profile photo.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow ORBIT to use your location to find nearby connections.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow ORBIT to access your photos for profile pictures.
